settings.heading: FEATURES
settings.content:
The fragrance refill is made from high-quality PE material, which slowly and evenly releases the aroma into the environment.


Ensures long-lasting and consistent scent intensity – without sudden changes or overly strong fragrance at the start.


Lasts up to 3 weeks, depending on usage frequency and ambient temperature.


High heat resistance – perfect for use in cars during both summer and winter.

settings.heading: SAFETY INFORMATION
settings.content:
CAUTION: H317: May cause an allergic skin reaction. H319: Causes serious eye irritation. H412: Harmful to aquatic life with long-lasting effects. Keep out of reach of children. Wash hands thoroughly after use. Wear protective gloves and eye protection. The manufacturer is not liable for any damage caused by improper use of the product.

IF IN EYES: Rinse carefully with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easily accessible. Continue rising. If skin irritation or rash occurs: seek medical attention. Avoid release to the environment. Dispose of contents/container in accordance with local/regional/national/international requirements.

CONTAINS: d-Limonene, 4-tert-butylcyclohexyl acetate, 2,4-dimethyl-3-cyclohexene-1-carboxaldehyde, allyl cyclohexane propionate, dl-citronellol, linalool, isoeugenyl methyl ether, geranyl acetate.

May cause an allergic reaction.

settings.heading: HOW TO USE
settings.content:
Remove the fragrance capsule from the pouch and insert it into the car air freshener holder designed for air vent installation.

Control the fragrance intensity through your car’s air vents – simply adjust the temperature and airflow to achieve your desired scent level.

settings.heading: SHIPPING
settings.content:
Estimated delivery times within the European Union:

  • Baltics: 1–3 business days
  • Central Europe: 3–6 business days
  • Rest of EU: 4–8 business days

Delivery times may vary slightly depending on your location.

settings.text: FREYERI premium car diffuser refill designed for a clean, fresh, and long-lasting scent. This car air freshener diffuser effectively eliminates odors while delivering a consistent fragrance experience. Easy to use and compatible with most car diffuser systems, it keeps your car interior smelling modern, fresh, and inviting every day.

Pomegranate adds a rich, juicy sweetness with a subtle tart edge that enhances depth and complexity in a fragrance. It acts as a vibrant fruity heart note, giving the scent a sensual, slightly exotic character while improving longevity and making the composition feel more luxurious and full-bodied.

Grapefruit introduces a bright, sparkling freshness that instantly lifts and energizes a fragrance. As a top note, it sharpens the opening with a crisp citrus bitterness, adds clarity, and balances heavier accords, making the scent feel clean, modern, and refreshing.

Tangerine brings a soft, sweet citrus nuance that smooths and rounds out a fragrance composition. It adds a gentle freshness without sharpness, enhancing warmth and approachability while creating a cheerful, light, and inviting opening that blends seamlessly with other notes.

settings.title: Our fragrances
settings.description: Buy 4 Refill Parfumes and Pay for only 3
